Cyclepoint with Schaefer 2018 example

2025-02-12

library(tidyverse)
library(lme4)
library(splines)
library(splines2)
library(easystats)
library(ggeffects)
library(merTools)
library(mgcv)
library(gamm4)
library(sjPlot)
library(patchwork)
##### Read file #####
MRIgam <- read.csv("parcel_activation.csv")
cyc <- paste('cyclepoint [',toString(seq(0.0,1.0,by=0.01)),']')

parclist <- c(15, 65, 73, 14, 51, 71, 78, 9, 57, 76,
              8, 6, 77, 55, 21, 60, 89, 99, 58, 23,
              53, 3, 67, 36, 49, 30, 56)

Learning Block

##### zstat4 #####
for (i in parclist){
  var = paste0("parcel_", i)
  formula = as.formula(paste(var, "s(cyclepoint,bs='cc')", sep = " ~ "))
  wholemg = gamm4(formula,data = MRIgam)
  mod = summary(wholemg$gam)
  print(mod)
  
  plot = plot(ggpredict(wholemg$gam, terms=c(cyc))) +
  #geom_line(color='#35b779') +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = conf.low, ymax = conf.high),fill='#943ddc', alpha = 0.15) +
  labs(x= 'cyclepoint',y='activation') +
  #annotate("text", x = 0.5, y = 3.2, label = var) +
  theme_classic()+
  theme(axis.line=element_line(size=0.6),
        axis.text=element_text(size=10),
        axis.title=element_text(size=12),
        plot.title = element_blank(),
        legend.title = element_blank(),
        legend.position='top') 
  print(plot)
}
## 
## Family: gaussian 
## Link function: identity 
## 
## Formula:
## parcel_15 ~ s(cyclepoint, bs = "cc")
## 
## Parametric coefficients:
##             Estimate Std. Error t value Pr(>|t|)
## (Intercept) -0.03871    0.05687  -0.681      0.5
## 
## Approximate significance of smooth terms:
##                 edf Ref.df     F p-value   
## s(cyclepoint) 2.168      8 8.433 0.00401 **
## ---
## Signif. codes:  0 '***' 0.001 '**' 0.01 '*' 0.05 '.' 0.1 ' ' 1
## 
## R-sq.(adj) =  0.212   
## lmer.REML = 42.341  Scale est. = 0.13581   n = 42
